parameters.query: SELECT direction, content FROM messages WHERE customer_id = '{{$('Receive Input').item.json.id}}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;

parameters.jsCode:
const history = $input.all().reverse().map(i => `${i.json.direction === 'inbound' ? 'Customer' : 'AI'}: ${i.json.content}`).join('\n');
return [{ json: { history, message: $('Extract Message').item.json.message, phone: $('Extract Message').item.json.phone } }];

parameters.query: UPDATE customers SET buying_intent_score = LEAST(buying_intent_score + 5, 100), last_intent = '{{$('Format History').item.json.message}}' WHERE phone_number = '{{$('Format History').item.json.phone}}';
